choices: A poorly(?) worded wish on the statue
A potion fell in her food
A gift from sai
Yuki ‘borrows’ her height
Readers choice
1.content:
It was friday afternoon and the first day of Chijimu’s weekend vacation. She stood just outside of the ryokan on a short, probably only four or five feet wide, patio with stairs down leading to a large garden rimmed with stone bricks. Going through it was a small creek that came in through the rock wall, opened into a pond and then flowed out the other side. The water was clear as glass and shimmered like it was liquid crystal, reflecting the light in all the colors of the rainbow. There were cherry blossom petals falling into the water, then floating along the creek and out with it. The petals lead Chijimu’s eyes to the vista. It was downright breathtaking. The cafe was situated in a forest covered mountain range with a view of the sea stretching out into the horizon with some distant mountains slightly peaking over it. There were also several picnic benches, a shishi-odoshi, and a rock garden. In the center of the rock garden was a statue which was said to grant wishes.

In this beautiful place with Chijimu were also three other girls. Over by the stream was a stick figure of a brunette (and her best friend) named Sai. She had her legs in the pond and she was laying down. She was tiredly staring up at the cherry tree. She looked to be quite relaxed, possibly taking a nap, but she’d occasionally kick at the water a bit, which proved she was awake.

Sitting at one of the four picnic benches were two other girls Chijimu didn’t know all that well. One, yuki, was a girl with snow white hair and an absurd figure. She seemed quite tired and had her head on the table. The other, Nokori, was a taller girl with jet black hair, watching one of her martial arts matches on her phone and idly eating some chicken rice she ordered.

How does Chijimu shrink?
1.title: The beginning

choices: Perv on one of her friends
Try to get onto the table
Try to get Sai’s attention
Make her way inside
Reader’s choice
11.content: Chijimu walked up to the inari statue. Legend had it that anyone who made a wish while scratching it’s chin would have their wish granted. Kaifuki decided to do exactly that and scratched the fox while whispering “I wish I was tiny.” The next thing she knew, everything was rapidly growing around her. Including her clothes. She tried to keep them on but quickly gave up and let them fall around her dwindling body. She quickly went down to three feet, then two, then one, then all the way down to half an inch and utterly swamped by the massive cloth. A moment later her clothes just kinda vanished and she heard a voice from nowhere ‘you’re extremely durable now and nobody will notice you without you making a considerable effort. I also got rid of any small animals and bugs. Enjoy, child~’ child? She was 19! Well maybe to a god everyone was a child, but still! Well, anyway, time to enjoy this! She happily looked around to the other girls present, trying to decide what to do first.
11.title: A poorly(?) worded wish on the statue

choices: Chijimu gives up and tries her luck with the others.
Chijimu finds a way across
Sai gets up before chijimu can find a way across
113.content: The best ways to play around would probably require help, and sai was the best person for it. Chijimu happily scurried across the garden and made her way towards her best friend, who now towered over her about a hundred and thirty times her size. She however was met with an imposing obstacle before even reaching the girl: the stream. It was like the nile river to the tiny girl, blocking her from reaching her giant best friend.
113.title: Try to get Sai’s attention

choices: They were the same height at 4’10
They were both 4’ and Yuki’s figure was even curvier
Yuki is taller, and isn’t done
Chijimu now 4’ with Yuki being 5’7
readers choice
14.content:
Yuki noticed Chijimu outside and hurried over to her “C-Come to my room, I wanna show you something!” She said in a nervous and excited tone as she lead Chijimu back inside.

Chijimu was confused but had no reason to protest as she let Yuki drag her along, her eyes on the shortstack’s round and soft butt as she lead her to one of the rooms.

“Now close your eyes and lean down.” Yuki said and Chijimu did as instructed. A moment later Chijimu felt a pair of soft lips which tasted like rasberry press against her. It also felt as if her clothes were getting looser.

The kiss ended far too soon and Yuki said “You can open them now.”

Chijimu opened her eyes to see...
14.title: Yuki ‘borrows’ her height

choices: “I’m sorry for overdoing it!”
“I know you’re into this. Please don’t be scared.”
Yuki smiled sadistically, it’s always the quiet ones.
143.content:
Chijimu was staring at her friend Yuki’s massive orbs, then looked up at her in confusion. Wait up?! She looked down to see what Yuki was standing on and shocked to see nothing. She then looked back up questioningly.

“What- what did you-“ Chijimu was cut off by another kiss by Yuki who simply said “It’d be easier to show you.”

This wasn’t like Yuki at... all... Chijimu’s thoughts were interrupted by an unbelievable sight, Yuki was getting taller, and she was getting shorter. Chijimu watched as Yuki tore through her clothes and she shrank into hers. After watching in awe she finished at a mere seven inches, compared to Yuki’s nine feet.
143.title: Yuki is taller, and isn’t done

info.brief_description: Chijimu wanted a relaxing weekend, but there’s a ‘small’ problem. GP for good adds!
info.description:
The story is about a girl named chijimu who finds herself tiny due to one of several causes. Getting to explore around (or on) her giantess friends. Everyone who adds will get 250gp! And more for my favorite adds until I run out (currently: 12,360).

Rules:
1. No one sentence chapters.
2. Only one bad end per option tree.
3. No male characters.

Now for the characters (I’ll add any others that people create to this list, just email me their paragraph!):

Chijimu is the star of our tiny tale. She’s a happy go lucky and perverted girl. While she was previously 5’7, she takes great joy in being shrunken and all the fun she can have at her new size.

Nokori was about 6’2 and had jet black hair. Her figure wasn’t particularly curvaceous but she was extremely toned and muscular. Nokori was a hard worker, but also extremely quiet. She wasn’t shy or anything, she just didn’t like to talk. She had just came second in a national martial arts tournament and was a bit down.

Yuki was only 4’ even, yet had a figure that would make anyone drool. It seemed as if everything she ate went to her DD cup tits and oversized thighs, yet none to her waist or height. She was quite shy and appeared to be the gentlest soul to ever walk the earth. She’s terrified of bugs, though. She always begged Nokori to kill them whenever she found one.

Sai was 5’7, the same as chijimu before she shrunk, and was an absolute stick figure of a brunette with a flat chest and pretty much no butt. She was a relaxed girl who could laugh off anything as not being a big deal. She also was chijimu’s best friend.
